description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with a broad, symmetrical blade on each side, both featuring a slightly curved cutting edge and a dark, weathered finish. The blades are decorated with white, intricate patterns resembling stylized birds or mythical creatures, giving the axe a distinctive and ornate appearance. The handle is long and cylindrical, primarily black with white decorative bands and a brown, ribbed grip section for secure handling. The ends of the handle are capped with white, conical metal fittings, adding both structural integrity and visual contrast. The overall construction suggests a robust, heavy-duty tool, likely intended for ceremonial or display purposes as much as for practical use. The axe exudes a medieval or fantasy aesthetic, making it a striking object in any urban or themed environment.
description: A double-headed, ornate battle axe with black, white, and brown detailing, featuring decorative engravings and a ribbed grip. The design is robust and visually striking, with a medieval or fantasy flair.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top, showing the narrow profile of the blades and the pointed end of the handle.
description_view_1: The full side view reveals both wide, decorated blades, the long handle with a brown grip, and the white end caps.
description_view_2: A direct end-on view highlights the thinness of the blade edges and the cylindrical handle, with the pointed pommel visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the symmetrical blade design and decorative motifs.
attribute_handle_type: Long, straight cylindrical handle with a brown ribbed leather grip, white metal end caps, and black and white decorative bands.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, symmetrical blades with wide, curved edges and white decorative engravings; no beard, with a central poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible metal fittings securing the blade to the handle.
attribute_visible_markings_or_labels: white decorative engravings resembling birds or mythical creatures
